tasks.description: Run npm run check:full and confirm all 665 unit + 131 E2E tests pass. Record baseline in docs/TEST_BASELINE.md.
tasks.notes: Fixed 3 pre-existing flaky tests: (1) ultimate-redirect using FORCE_LOCAL_REDIRECT env var instead of auto-detection, (2) frontend-functionality test.setTimeout(120000) + waitForTimeout 2000→500ms, (3) integration tests using /manage/safari-camp slug (invalid) replaced with /manage/1. Baseline: 833 unit tests + 137 E2E = 970 total.

tasks.description: Create schema snapshot in docs/schema_snapshot_YYYYMMDD.sql as rollback reference.
Verify existing functionality works. Manual smoke test of critical flows documented.
tasks.notes: Verified via E2E: registration flow (list-your-camp), listing display (stay/safari-camp), management dashboard (manage/1), plugin lifecycle, cross-system integration. All 137 E2E pass from clean run.

tasks.description: Confirm tasks.json + BLUEPRINT.md committed, tasks.json correctly structured (67 tasks with id, description, status, blocked_by).
Confirm working dataset. Document all existing table names.
Create src/db/migrations/001_core_posts.sql with sites, posts, postmeta, options tables and indexes.
Create src/db/migrations/002_themes_registry.sql with available_themes table.

Write migration runner src/lib/runMigrations.ts. Reads *.sql from src/db/migrations/ ordered by filename. Tracks applied migrations in schema_migrations table. Called on app bootstrap in src/lib/db.ts.
Add Drizzle schema symbols in src/db/schema.ts for sites, posts, postmeta, options, available_themes.
Write unit tests src/lib/__tests__/core-schema.test.ts: insert site/post/postmeta/option, assert UNIQUE constraints and CASCADE deletes.
Write data migration script scripts/migrate-properties-to-sites.ts. Copies properties rows to sites, normalising plan values (subdomain→premium, custom_domain/ultimate→ultimate). Idempotent upsert.
Run migrations on dev DB. Verify npm run test:all still passes.
tasks.notes: 850 unit tests pass (up from 833). Migration applied to sinaicamps.db: sites table populated with 3 rows (safari-camp/premium, mountain-lodge/basic, acacia/ultimate).

tasks.description: Create src/lib/PostQuery.ts with static query(args) method. Supports siteId, postType, status, postSlug, authorId, parentId, meta[], search, orderBy, order, limit, offset. Returns Post[] with meta map. Always scopes by site_id.
Create src/lib/PostRepository.ts: createPost, updatePost, deletePost (trash), getMeta, setMeta (upsert), deleteMeta, getAllMeta.
Create src/lib/OptionsRepository.ts: getOption, setOption (upsert), deleteOption, getAutoloadOptions.
Write unit tests src/lib/__tests__/post-query.test.ts: query by type, meta key/value, compare <=, cross-site isolation, getAllMeta completeness, setMeta upsert.
Write unit tests src/lib/__tests__/options-repository.test.ts: set/get/delete cycle, default value, cross-site isolation.
Verify npm run test:all still passes after adding new tests.
Extend src/lib/hooks.ts: add doAction(), applyFilters(), priority parameter to register(). Keep existing API as backward-compat shim.
Create src/lib/SiteHookManager.ts. SiteHookManager.forSite(siteId) returns instance with only hooks from plugins active for that site.

Add core action hooks: core:request:bootstrap, core:site:resolved, core:post:before_save, core:post:after_save, core:post:before_delete, core:option:get, core:option:set, core:theme:loaded. Fire from relevant code paths.
Update PluginAPI.ts to expose doAction and applyFilters at top level. Mark hooks.execute as deprecated.
Write unit tests src/lib/__tests__/hooks-engine.test.ts: doAction fires all handlers, applyFilters waterfall, priority ordering, site-scoped isolation.
Verify all existing hook tests still pass. Run npm run test:all.

Create themes/camp-classic/ by refactoring templates/shop-frontend/. Add theme.json per contract. Remove all hardcoded field names from theme components; replace with useMeta() hook calls. Verify tsc --noEmit passes.
Create src/lib/ThemeLoader.ts: load(themeId), resolveTemplate(themeId, postType, context), getWidgetAreas(themeId), getCustomFields(themeId). Fires core:theme:loaded action.
Create src/lib/ThemeRegistry.ts: reads themes/ dirs on startup, registers to available_themes DB table, getForSite(siteId), activate(siteId, themeId).
Create src/hooks/useMeta.ts React hook: useMeta(postId, key) and useAllMeta(postId). Used by theme templates.
Create src/app/api/theme/route.ts: GET /api/theme?siteId= and GET /api/theme/templates?siteId=&postType=&context=.
Update src/app/api/tenant/serve/route.ts to use ThemeLoader instead of hardcoded builds/<slug>/dist/ path. Keep builds/ fallback for backward-compat.
Add theme picker to list-your-camp/branding registration step. Fetch themes from GET /api/themes. Store theme_id in sessionStorage. Pass to POST /api/owner/register.
Create src/app/api/themes/route.ts: GET /api/themes returns list of active themes with name, description, screenshot.
Write unit tests src/lib/__tests__/theme-loader.test.ts: template hierarchy resolution, fallback chain, getCustomFields merge.
Write E2E test: visit tenant subdomain, assert HTML served by correct theme template (data-theme attribute or title).
Create src/lib/RequestContext.ts with RequestContext interface (siteId, site, theme, activePlugins, autoloadOptions, hooks, isMainDomain, plan). bootstrap(siteId) and current() via AsyncLocalStorage.
Update src/middleware.ts: call RequestContext.bootstrap(siteId) after tenant resolution. Serialise safe fields as request headers. Fire core:request:bootstrap and core:site:resolved actions.
Create src/lib/SiteBootstrap.ts: loadActivePlugins(siteId) and loadAutoloadOptions(siteId). Called by RequestContext.bootstrap.
Create src/lib/getContext.ts helper that wraps RequestContext.current() and throws typed error if called outside request scope.
Write unit tests src/lib/__tests__/request-context.test.ts: bootstrap returns correct data, current() returns null outside scope, two concurrent bootstraps do not bleed.
Create migration 003_plugins_v2.sql: add campops_version, post_types, plan_requirement, zip_url, review_status columns to available_plugins.
Create migration 004_site_plugins.sql: add activated_at, activated_by, version columns to property_plugins.
Create src/lib/PluginLoader.ts: init(siteId), activate(siteId, pluginId), deactivate(siteId, pluginId). Respects plan_requirement. Calls onActivate/onDeactivate hooks.
Update PluginAPI.ts: pass RequestContext into makePluginAPI, add api.registerPostType(definition) which fires core:post_type:registered action.
Create src/app/api/plugins/store/route.ts: GET returns approved plugins filtered by site plan. POST /install activates plugin via PluginLoader.activate.
Build Plugin Store UI at src/app/[locale]/manage/[listingId]/plugins/page.tsx: installed vs available, install/uninstall, plan badges, category filter.
Enforce plan-based plugin access in PluginLoader.activate. Throw PlanRequirementError if site.plan < plugin.plan_requirement.
Write unit tests src/lib/__tests__/plugin-loader.test.ts: activate fires onActivate, deactivate fires onDeactivate, plan enforcement, two-site isolation.
Verify all existing plugin tests still pass.
Create migration 005_normalise_plans.sql: UPDATE properties and sites to map subdomain→premium, custom_domain→ultimate.
Update all code comparing plan === 'subdomain' or plan === 'custom_domain' to use normalised names. Files: middleware.ts, auth/redirect-check, owner/register, list-your-camp/plan, tenant/serve.
Create src/lib/PlanGate.ts: check(site, requiredPlan), canUsePlugin(site, plugin), canUseTheme(site, theme). Plan order: basic < premium < ultimate.

Create src/app/api/owner/upgrade/route.ts: POST body {siteId, newPlan, subdomain?, customDomain?}. Validates upgrade direction. Provisions subdomain/domain fields. Fires core:site:plan_upgraded action.
Build upgrade UI in src/app/[locale]/owner/property/page.tsx: current plan badge, upgrade buttons with subdomain/domain fields, calls POST /api/owner/upgrade.
Update registration wizard plan page to use basic/premium/ultimate as plan IDs. Remove subdomain and custom_domain as plan IDs.
Write unit tests src/lib/__tests__/plan-gate.test.ts: check(basicSite, premium)→false, check(ultimateSite, basic)→true, ultimate-required plugin blocked for premium.
Create src/app/api/manifest.webmanifest/route.ts: dynamic JSON manifest built from site branding options. Applies applyFilters('core:manifest:build', manifest, {siteId}).
Update src/app/api/tenant/serve/route.ts to inject <style> block with CSS variables (--color-primary, --color-accent, --font-heading) from site branding options into served index.html.
Create src/app/api/media/[siteId]/[key]/route.ts: redirects to media URL stored in options(siteId, 'media:<key>'). Used for logo, hero_image, favicon.
Register hook listener on core:site:plan_upgraded in src/lib/listeners/buildListener.ts. For ultimate upgrades: writes BUILD_REQUIRED event to build_queue table.
Create migration 006_build_queue.sql with build_queue table (id, site_id, status, triggered_by, created_at, started_at, finished_at, error).
Create src/app/api/admin/build-queue/route.ts: GET lists queue (master admin only), POST triggers build for a site.
Update BrandingContext.tsx in themes/camp-classic to fetch branding from GET /api/branding?siteId= and remove VITE_* fallbacks except as last resort.
Write tests for core:manifest:build filter hook and CSS injection logic in serve route.
Add PostQuery.globalQuery(args) that queries across all active sites (no siteId filter). Requires postType. Applies applyFilters('core:global_query:args', args) before executing.
Refactor src/app/api/public/featured-listings/route.ts to use PostQuery.globalQuery instead of raw SQL against properties.
Refactor src/app/api/public/search/route.ts to use PostQuery.globalQuery.
Refactor src/app/[locale]/page.tsx FeaturedListings component to receive data from PostQuery.globalQuery as server component prop.
Create src/app/api/public/listings/route.ts: GET with type, status, limit, meta[] query params. Fires applyFilters('core:public_listings:query', args).
Refactor basic-tier listing detail page (/stay/<slug>) to load data from PostQuery by site.slug→siteId→PostQuery.
Write integration tests for cross-site isolation: global query returns posts from all sites; site-scoped query never returns posts from other sites.
Refactor manage/[listingId]/layout.tsx: remove hardcoded nav links and Lucide icon list. Replace with dynamic menuItems from GET /api/plugins/ui-registry?siteId=.
Create generic DashboardPage component reading PluginShell slots for dashboard.top, dashboard.main, dashboard.sidebar. Falls back to empty state if no plugins active.
Create src/app/[locale]/manage/[listingId]/posts/[postType]/page.tsx: generic list page for any plugin-registered post type. Fetches via GET /api/site/posts.

Create src/app/[locale]/manage/[listingId]/posts/[postType]/[postId]/page.tsx: generic post editor. Loads post + all meta. Renders form fields from registered meta definitions. Applies applyFilters('core:post_editor:fields', fields). Save calls PUT /api/site/posts/[postId].
Create src/app/api/site/posts/route.ts: GET (PostQuery), POST (PostRepository.createPost + core:post:after_save action).
Create src/app/api/site/posts/[postId]/route.ts: GET (post + all meta), PUT (update post + upsert meta), DELETE (trash).
Create src/app/api/site/options/route.ts: GET with keys[] param, PUT for batch upsert.
Write E2E tests: log in as site owner, visit manage dashboard, create post of plugin-registered type, edit post and save meta field, verify value persists on reload.
Create migration 007_plugin_submissions.sql with plugin_submissions table (id, plugin_id, submitted_by, version, zip_url, manifest, review_notes, status, reviewed_by, submitted_at, reviewed_at).
Create src/app/api/plugins/submit/route.ts: POST accepts {pluginId, version, manifest, zipUrl}. Inserts into plugin_submissions. Fires core:plugin:submitted action.
Create src/app/api/admin/plugins/submissions/route.ts (master admin only): GET list pending, PATCH approve/reject. On approval: upsert to available_plugins with review_status=approved.
Build submission review UI at src/app/[locale]/admin/plugins/page.tsx.
Write unit tests for plugin submission state machine: pending→approved, pending→rejected, duplicate submission handling.
Add server-side auth check to every src/app/api/site/* and src/app/api/manage/* route. Verify GET /api/site/posts without session returns 401.
Add CORS headers to manage/ and master/ API routes via next.config.mjs headers or middleware layer.
Extend apiRateLimiter from /api/p/* to cover /api/site/* and /api/public/* endpoints.
Confirm all PostQueryArgs values are passed as SQLite bound parameters (no string interpolation). Add a fuzz test.
Audit all 18 existing plugins for db.execute calls that do not respect site_id scoping. Document findings.
Profile three most common queries against posts + postmeta. Add composite indexes if needed (e.g. site_id, post_type, post_status).
For each migration 00N_*.sql create a corresponding 00N_*.rollback.sql.
Test all new migrations and queries against PostgreSQL (production target). Fix SQLite-isms: unixepoch()→EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()), etc.
Update docs/TEST_COVERAGE_REPORT.md with new coverage baseline.
Run npm run check:full — all checks green.
